title: stelis magdalenae
intro: Stelis magdalenae, also known as the Stelis orchid, is a type of flowering plant species belonging to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis magdalenae include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, which are typically used to harness its medicinal properties.
